_schema.description: Upcoming scheduled events that the morning brief surfaces in the 'next 24h to watch' section. Hand-maintained — there is no public feed that aggregates these for the coffee complex.

entry_shape.date: YYYY-MM-DD (UTC) — the day the event is scheduled to publish
entry_shape.time: HH:MM (UTC), optional — used to filter sub-24h instead of sub-day
entry_shape.category: wasde | ico | vietnam_customs | cecafe | fnd | central_bank | other
entry_shape.title: Short display title shown in the brief
entry_shape.url: Source URL where the published data will appear, optional
entry_shape.notes: Free-text rationale or watch-list reason, optional

_schema.selection_rule: morning_brief.py filters to entries within +24h of the run timestamp (or +0..+1 days when only `date` is set).
_schema.maintainer_note: Add new entries here when scheduling is known. Re-publish events for next year by date arithmetic in the brief — do NOT carry stale past entries forward.

events.title: RCF26 First Notice Day
events.notes: RC (Robusta) Jan 2026 contract — watch for max-OI roll into the next month in the prior 26 business days.

events.title: USDA WASDE — 2026-01 report
events.notes: Monthly world S&D balance; coffee section usually drives end-of-year stocks revisions.

events.title: Vietnam Customs — Jan 2026 export bulletin (approx)
events.notes: Monthly export figures; published 22-28 of each month. Date is approximate — VN Customs has been irregular in 2025-26.

events.title: ICO Coffee Market Report — Jan 2026
events.notes: Monthly composite indicator + export figures; published end of month.
